transcript.text:
(The article that was uploaded about a month ago...)
(Tzuyang's "Giant Pork Cutlet" will be on the next level...)
('I think it'll all come down to price...' Just look at the size of the dish!!)
(Tzuyang's "Giant Pork Cutlet")
(really drew a lot of attention from the online community)
(There were many talks over this dish even before the opening day...)
(The size?)
Thank you
(The price?)
The price is
Yeap, that'll be it
(The taste?)
It's just...
(Time to reveal the truth...) I think we should use
the pizza box for this
(It's Tzuyang's "Giant Pork Cutlet")

(you've all been waiting for...)
Hello everyone
So, to start off
I saw many news articles and posts
(The leak article & photo of the place) saying that
I'm opening up a pork cutlet place
So I'm here to explain things today
(Is the rumor true?) And yes, I'm opening up a pork cutlet restaurant
(It's right beside 'Gardenbunsik'!)
The chefs and I have been preparing this for a long time
(The store was not in business this day! The opening date is May 1st!) The place will be open starting next week
So I'm here for the final check
(I'm dying to know the size of it...) And people have been wondering about the size of the food
So I'm here to show you the size while I'm at it!
And it really is a big one
(Located in Dongjak-gu, Seoul)

('Tzuyang's Giant Pork Cutlet')
Swooosh!
(Here comes the owner) Good to see you
I'm here for the final check today
- We got it ready - Really?
(And this guy is...?!) It's been a while...
(Looks like he's a bit shy...) Hello
You were on the 'Gardenbunsik' episode
(He was the chef on 'Gardenbunsik' episode!)
Can you do the meme dance again?
(He did a little talent show at the get-together...heh) What's going on here now
(LOLOLOL)
- I really had a hard time... - Really?
Because you pointed things from A to Z
(Did I really...do that...? Heh) Was I? Really?
We have one more witness here!

- (Don't pull me into this...!) - Really? Was I that picky?
Every owner should be like that...heh
So lately
I've been coming here a lot to make final revisions
(And the dish is about to be revealed...!!) And today's the final version
Oh, right, the order
(+Tzuyang's Giant Pork Cutlet) I'll just have one giant pork cutlet for now
(Chef is on the way!) Alright, coming right up
- Thank you - No problem!
Let's get a tour of the place, shall we?
(We got your desserts ready! There are coffee machines!!) We got black coffee, instant coffee as well
(And the nostalgic 3-colored ice cream...!) And the old school 3-colored ice cream for dessert
We got a second floor as well!
(Rushing)
(Tada!) Tada
It's all rooms on the 2nd floor!

(Tzuyang the owner, looks satisfied) The space looks nice
(While Tzuyang was busy doing the tour...) And that's the photo zone, tada
(As you might've guessed from the name)
(When we say it's giant, we mean giant giant...)
(It's about this size!)
(Tzuyang's Giant Pork Cutlet)
(Now that's a giant one for sure...!)
(Food is served) Thank you
(Gets her every time...)
(The size that surprises even the owner) Thank you
So as you told us last week
- we changed the bread powder - Really?!
You'll feel the difference in the texture wise
(Thank you so much...!!!) Thanks for the great work! Really!
(Food is served) Every time I see it, I think
(Sure it is...) maybe it's too big!

(Now you've seen it for sure) So that's the size of it
I think it's twice as big as my face
So apart from the size
(What's the price of it...?!) people have been asking me the price
So the price is
9,800 won ($7.5), yeap
(All the side dishes) You can get unlimited refills of salad, macaroni
and the soup too
Thanks for the food!
(Soup first!)
(Embarrassed to self-compliment) I'm embarrassed to say it's delicious
(That's a stretch though) It's just a soup
You can get unlimited refills at the salad bar
(Word "Delicious" is not allowed!!!) I'm not going to say that it's delicious today
Oh! It's way thicker than before!
(Are you satisfied now...?) What's with the thickness?

It's way thicker than before!
That's what you told us to do the last time!!!
(Oh, yeah, right...:D)
I'm super satisfied X4
I normally eat pork cutlets like this but
(It's impossible...) this one's too big for that
It's more Western style than Japanese
It's more of a thin, spread-out Donkatsu
(Can't give up on the Western style...) Since I prefer this one, I chose to go with this
And that's the thickness
(Can't break the promise I made myself...) I'm not going to say that "It's delicious" today
Chef!
This is really great!
Thank goodness...
That line took 5 months!
(I'm the one to blame) Sorry about that

(So close to saying "It's delicious")
(This was filmed way before the opening date!) I think we can open the place next week
Yaaay! It's the opening day!!
Yaaaay! No more revisions!
(Sorry for being too picky...) Sorry about that
(Keep forgetting that she made a promise...)
(It's okay) The soybean soup is at par
Our producer
tried this but couldn't finish....
(The amount was just crazy...)
Why does this taste like cucumber? Did you put cucumbers?
No, siree
Oh! The macaroni!
Inside the macaroni salad?!
(The culprit) Noooo!
Take it out, please!!

(Not referring to herself lol) Because many people don't like it so much
(The culprit) I think he did that on purpose...
Oh really?
Just this time? LOL
I think it's his first time putting in the cucumbers in LOL
(She's about to cry...LOLOLOL) I can taste nothing but the cucumber
We didn't put cucumber originally...
Did he really just put it today?!
I think there's an intention!
I just wanted it to be more moist...
(LOLOLOL)
I should try other things as well
So it's all done, right?
You think you'll be okay?
Oh, don't even worry about it...
(The real intention) I opened this place for myself

(I hope we make money out of this...)
We got 10.5 oz of pork in here
There might be a slight difference
in the size and the thickness of it
(While she's enjoying the giant pork cutlet...)
(Here comes the hearty side menus!)
(The backups to support the pork cutlet!)
(Heaps of cheese)
(Standing by, inside the oven)
(Where were you...?) I saw this on the menu here
(You can order extra sauce as well!) Extra sauce
(Soaking the whole thing...) That's a lot actually
(All about hygiene) (What's the next menu that macho-sweetheart chef's cooking?)
(A mix of must for Koreans, kimchi, and rice)
(It's kimchi fried rice...!!)
(And sprinkles of onion crumbles!)

(Your food is here) Your cheese pasta is served
And here's the kimchi fried rice
All of the menus come in large portions
but you can get the take-out box for the leftovers
You can always take it out when you want to
(Starting with the oven spaghetti!) Cheese spaghetti, that's a lot
(Careful not to grab the plate!) It's really hot here
Half cheese, half spaghetti...!!
(We used quality cheese on this one...heh) And we chose to go with this delicious cheese
(It's taking forever to mix heaps of cheese...)
(Be careful) Yikes, that's hot
(Shhh! It's a secret) No comment on the taste
(Still got one more bang...)
(Inside this cute round cutlet...)
(It's literally flowing with cheese!!)
(Guacamole Cheese Pork Cutlet)

Thank you
This is huge!
Actually, that's my favorite menu...
It's got...
cheese in it
It's 100% Imsil Cheese
(Was about to say delicious again lol) Don't say that now
It's not that I want to promote it
(My little babies) but I'm just proud of these
(My little babies) little babies here
(I was just adoring them...lol) So anyways, it's 100% Imsil cheese* *Cheese brand in Korea
It's got guacamole in it too
Personally, this one's my favorite
(Too excited) (We got more food...?)
(It's Hamburger Steak!) Thank you
(Make sure you cool it off, people) Oooh, that's hot

Is it too hot?
Nope!
It's just too delicious...!!!
(Still not keeping her promise)
(But this one's my favorite one! LOL)
(She's just openly saying it now)
We tried about 10 cheeses for this menu
and chose to go with the one that tastes the best
And Imsil cheese*... *Cheese brand in Korea
(Crazy over taste) The pricier it is, the better
(Next up, it's hamburger steak!)
That's nice
(Trying to hold down the reaction)
That's just plain, soft hamburger steak
(Kimchi fried rice & Sunny-side-up egg) Got rice over here
(Gotta mix it before you eat it...!!) Let's pop the egg yolk

(Must...hold my feelings...down...)
The rice
unlike the ones that roll inside your mouth
It's rather a sticky one
- Can I get a piece of bread? - Bread?
(Dinner rolls are here) Is that it? Thank you
Fresh out the oven
You can choose either a piece of bread or rice
You order bread, you get bread
You order rice, it's rice
That sounded too obvious
(Bread-bread) You order bread, you get bread
(Rice-rice) You order rice, you get rice
(Stop teasing me...!) That sounded weird
(Getting the steak on top of bread!)
It's just plain soft bread

(Another stretch) Just plain
And yeah...
(Sounding like a broken record...) And yeah... Everything's just...
(All in all, it's all good heh) edible
The store is busy preparing for the opening day today
And since I'm here for just the final check
I'll pack these leftovers and finish them back home
(Off to get the take-out box)
We haven't prepared a proper box for the take-out
This is just temporary stuff
(We got it ready now!) We'll be properly ready then
(More food for me back home!!!)
And because all of the
pork cutlets are hand made
It might take some time to cook them
So if people come in large groups

it might take some time to cook them
So I hope you could be generous about the waiting time if that happens
Gee, chefs...
Thanks for all the hard work for a long time...!
(For sure X3...!!!)
(Dobby, I mean the chef is free...) Thanks for saying it's over after 5 months
Is 5 months a long time...?
- 5 months?! - Yeah
Even fine dining restaurants take 3 months!
(Crazy for the taste...LOLOLOL)
It's just that...I have...
(Having a clear direction is always good!) my own style of food and taste...
But thanks for keeping things up with me
(Great job everyone...!) We'll work hard
(Let's go Team Tzuyang!) Let's do this!
I really wanted to do this when I get my own restaurant

(Free ice creams!!) Tada! It's this one
(Ice cream for dessert can't go wrong...!)
(Next up, it's free coffee!!) We also got coffee over here
(It's almost like a course meal...!) I'll take the instant coffee
So thanks
for another great meal today!
